description: This repository includes all the codes developed for the study title "A Hybrid Experimental and Machine Learning Framework for Designing and Predicting Compressive Strength of Ultra-High-Performance Concrete" authored by Mohamed Ayman, and Amr ElNemr

Machine Learning and Deep Learning framework for forecasting climate change indicators, carbon emissions, and environmental pollution using Random Forest, XGBoost, Bi-LSTM, and Hybrid Ensemble Models.
A Non-Intrusive Diagnostic Framework for Evaluating Scientific Claims in Quantum Machine Learning
Machine Learning based framework for estimation of Effective Population Size(Ne) from genetic summary statistics
A machine learning framework that sets tensors ablaze.

Proud to have presented our research paper, "SmartFlow: A Multimodal Machine Learning Framework for Menstrual Cycle Phase Detection Using Physiological and Symptom-Based Data," at ICDAM 2026. Completed under the guidance of Dr. Khushboo Tripathi at Sharda University, this work reflects my passion for AI, ML, and healthcare innovation.
AI-Powered Phishing Website Detection Framework using Python, Machine Learning, and Cybersecurity

A coleo definitiva e curada de recursos de Inteligncia Artificial (AI), Machine Learning (ML) e Deep Learning (DL). Inclui frameworks, modelos, datasets, MLOps, LLMs e aplicaes financeiras/comerciais.

A comprehensive and extensible ontology for systematically modeling fairness notions, metrics, biases, evaluation methods, and scientific provenance in machine learning. This ontology provides researchers, developers, and practitioners with a unified, machine-readable framework to guide the design and assessment of fair ML systems.

A fault-tolerant, single-module computational framework for automated epizootic plasmid risk assessment and biothreat stratification featuring topological gene proximity networking, machine learning classification, and relational SQLite warehousing.

**AI Robot Brain** is an AI-powered intelligence framework for robots, enabling perception, reasoning, decision-making, and autonomous actions. It integrates computer vision, natural language processing, and machine learning to help robots understand their environment, interact naturally, and perform complex tasks efficiently.
Started my Machine Learning Journey by picking up FastAPI as a backend framework.

This is and end to end Machine learning/deep learning project which uses tensorflow framework to build an NLP and LSTM based model which processes user given text to predict whether the news is fake or real. It is also fully deployed using FastAPI to serve the model and streamlit as user interface.

Security Vulnerability Detection Framework designed to identify and mitigate key operating system vulnerabilities such as buffer overflows, cache poisoning, and abnormal system behavior. The framework combines rule-based monitoring with machine learningbased anomaly detection to provide real-time alerts and improved system security

Streamlit is an open-source Python framework that makes it easy to build and share beautiful, custom web apps for machine learning and data science. With Streamlit, you can turn data scripts into shareable web applications in minutes without needing front-end experience.
Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

Leakage-aware multimodal ML framework for MDD detection from multi-site fMRI/sMRI (REST-meta-MDD, 2380 subjects, 25 sites). Late-fusion of functional connectivity + VBM with SVM, XGBoost & GNN baselines. LOSO validation, ComBat harmonization, HAMD severity regression, Haufe-transformed biomarker maps.
Advanced framework combining 2D contaminant transport simulation (advectiondiffusion) with machine learning to classify ecological risk (Low/Medium/High) and generate dashboards, GIFs, and reports.
Machine learning framework for avocado maturity classification using multimodal fusion of portable NIRS and RGB colorimetry.

A production-grade test harness for evaluating machine learning model quality beyond accuracy metrics. This framework systematically detects ambiguous predictions, excessive model uncertainty, and prediction flakiness, critical indicators of model reliability in production systems.
A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

Machine learning framework for non-invasive blood glucose estimation using Photoplethysmography (PPG) signals, feature engineering, wavelet scattering transform, physiological signal analysis, and XGBoost regression.
Pure Go machine learning framework. Train, run, and serve ML models with go build. Zero CGo.
Machine learning framework for Enterococcus cecorum pathogenicity prediction (Antimicrobial Resistance + genomic islands + pangenome)
A Machine Learning Framework for Automated Validation of Text in Academic Writing

DriftGuard is a machine learning monitoring framework that detects data drift, prediction drift, and model performance degradation using PSI and KS tests. It includes automated alerts, incident logging, and a Streamlit dashboard for real-time model health monitoring and drift visualization.
Machine learning framework for credit risk assessment with model comparison, SHAP explainability, and customer risk segmentation.
CdWise-ML-Framework: A Machine Learning Framework for Health Risk Prediction of Cadmium in Vegetables
Machine Learning framework for Environmental Epidemiology (MLEE)
A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software. With repository stars and forks
Biomarker discovery in psoriasis: an integrated featureselection and machine learning framework for identifyingdiagnostic genes
AI VIGIL-GUARD is a real-time adversarial attack detection and defense framework designed to protect machine learning models from malicious input manipulation during inference.

An empirical benchmarking framework evaluating Random Forest, SVM, and XGBoost classifiers for real-time network intrusion and phishing URL detection, focusing on the precision-latency trade-off.machine-learning  cybersecurity  intrusion-detection  phishing-detection  xgboost  random-forest  benchmarking  python
An open-source Python framework for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning.
Predictive Machine Learning pipeline and Explainable AI framework for sports injury profiling.

A theoretical and empirical re-assessment of aleatoric uncertainty in machine learning. Introduces a formal framework that decomposes aleatoric uncertainty into measurable components and demonstrates that a substantial portion of traditionally irreducible uncertainty can be systematically reduced.
A state-of-the-art machine learning framework for predicting Aromatase inhibitor activity, featuring scaffold splitting, Bayesian optimization, and Stacking Ensembles.

This repository provides data and Python code for machine learningbased optimization of L-DOPA extraction from Vicia faba. It uses CART and ensemble models to identify high-yield conditions, offering an interpretable decision-support framework for scalable and industrial extraction processes.
Explainable AI-based framework for detecting risky cross-device IP configuration inconsistencies using rule-based validation, machine learning, and XAI techniques.
SECS is a machine learning framework designed for structure elucidation from spectra such as NMR and IR.
A simple framework for having a practice in machine learning. From feature extraction, data preparation, to experiment execuation.
dgbpy is a framework for research and deployment of machine learning models from seismic and well data.
Integrated machine learning and mixed-integer optimization framework for HVAC-aware electric fleet routing under uncertainty.

A robust machine learning framework for predicting the axial load capacity of Concrete-Filled Steel Tubular (CFST) columns. The project utilizes XGBoost optimized with Optuna and provides interpretability via SHAP values to analyze feature importance compared to existing benchmarks.

Built a feedforward neural network from scratch in Python using NumPy. Implemented forward propagation, backpropagation, and gradient-based optimization to solve the XOR classification problem without machine learning frameworks.

This project focuses on bridging the gap between advanced artificial intelligence and accessible web interfaces. By leveraging Python as the core programming language and Flask as the lightweight web framework, this application demonstrates how to wrap machine learning models into functional, user-friendly web services.

FinSight AI is a premium financial intelligence application featuring automated transaction classification, real-time transaction anomaly detection, and predictive cash flow forecasting. It is built using Django REST Framework for the core API, FastAPI for the Machine Learning service, and React (Vite + TypeScript) for the frontend dashboard.

A growing machine learning framework built entirely from scratch in pure Python  no external libraries such as NumPy or scikit-learn.  The goal is to deeply understand how machine learning algorithms work internally by implementing them from first principles.
An end-to-end Machine Learning network intrusion detector featuring a live-streaming Streamlit dashboard integrated with the MITRE ATT&CK framework.
Machine learning framework for NIPT: mixed-effects model for fetal DNA concentration prediction & two-stage random forest for T13/T18/T21 chromosomal aneuploidy detection.

A reproducible, data-centric benchmarking framework evaluating the robustness of tabular machine learning models under systematic feature shift using OpenML-CC18 datasets and automated feature engineering.
CatBench - Benchmark Framework of Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials in Adsorption Energy Predictions

PavData is a data-centric framework and platform for managing pavement research data, integrating laboratory tests, performance-based methodologies, and machine learning models in pavement engineering.
A Python Framework for Multi-Agent Programming with Machine Learning

A car evaluation system refers to a framework, algorithm, or software program used to assess a vehicle based on specific parameters. Depending on the context, this system can serve distinct purposes: calculating financial resale values, conducting deep mechanical diagnostics, analyzing consumer acceptability datasets for machine learning.
An inference server for your machine learning models, including support for multiple frameworks, multi-model serving and more
Deep learning framework for de novo antimicrobial peptide (AMP) discovery using a Variational Autoencoder (VAE), physicochemical feature engineering, and machine learning-based AMP screening.
Refiner by Macrodata Labs, a data processing framework for Machine Learning large scale datasets
A multi-party collaborative machine learning framework
A versatile local LLM framework for chat, image, video, machine learning modelling, speech, and automation
Multi-Modal Machine Learning Framework for Social Media Addiction Risk Prediction Using Behavioural, Textual, and Demographic Data

A multi-sensor machine learning framework for Boro rice mapping, district-level yield prediction, and irrigation advisory in Bangladesh using Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, Landsat LST, CHIRPS rainfall, and BBS agricultural data.
A collection of AI/ML engineering projects covering deep learning, MLOps, LLM frameworks, RAG applications, scalable pipelines, FastAPIs, Docker and production-focused machine learning systems.
An Integrated machine learning and monte carlo simulation framework for cost overrun  prediction and decision optimization in Hydroelectric projects in Uttarakhand and Himachal Pradesh

The Intelligent Medical Diagnosis System is a web-based application developed using Machine Learning (ML  Machine Learning) and the Django Framework. The primary objective of this system is to predict diseases based on user-selected symptoms through supervised learning techniques.

Plataforma Enterprise de SOC - SIEM em tempo real, automao SOAR, framework MITRE ATT&CK, deteco de anomalias com Machine Learning (TensorFlow), dashboard profissional e WebSocket. Desenvolvido em Rust para mxima performance.

To design and implement a robust machine learning framework to forecast one-month-ahead stock volatility using historical price data, enhancing risk assessment capabilities and enabling data-driven portfolio diversification.

A comprehensive end-to-end Multimodal Machine Learning Framework designed to benchmark, compare, and deploy AI models across multiple data modalities including Text, Image, Audio, Video, and Tabular/Sensor data, allowing each modality to be developed, tested, and extended independently while maintaining a common evaluation and deployment pipeline.

A machine learning framework built from mathematical foundations, implementing classical ML algorithms from scratch in Python and C++ without the use of high-level ML libraries. All linear algebra operations, probability distributions, and optimization techniques are derived and implemented manually.
Machine learning and graph-based framework for the prediction and inverse discovery of topological materials using physics-informed descriptors, ensemble learning, and materials informatics.

FIFA World Cup 2026 Predictive Matrix Engine. Leverages machine learning models, real-time football data pipelines, and the LLM framework to process live tournament metrics and generate automated expert match previews.
This project will develop a machine-learning framework for continuous overnight sleep EEG analysis using a subject-specific perspectiv

A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.
Machine learning and graph neural network framework for materials property prediction using JARVIS-DFT, matminer, XGBoost, and PyTorch Geometric.
Machine Learning framework for JavaScript

A non-invasive AI framework using CNNs to identify early signs of substance abuse from visual cues. The system analyzes facial expressions and classifies images into 'Addicted' or 'Not Addicted' based on emotional distress patterns. Optimized with data augmentation and deep learning for scalable, real-world deployment.
High-Dimensional Big-Data Analytics Framework for Real-Time-Streaming and Machine-Learning applications, delivering Scalable Intelligent Insights Optimizer.
Molecular Graph Processing and Machine Learning Framework for Molecular Sciences
GraphMLGO - Topology-aware Machine Learning Guided Compiler Optimizations Framework

A hybrid machine learning and LLM agent framework for weather-driven solar output prediction. Combines geospatial satellite data and Bureau of Meteorology weather records to generate daily solar yield estimates with calibrated confidence scores, accessible through a natural-language Q&A interface built on Claude Haiku 4.5 and FastAPI.

Hybrid AI framework for intelligent customer communication management in e-commerce systems. The project combines natural language processing, predictive machine learning models, and explainable AI techniques to analyze customer interactions, predict escalation or churn risks, and optimize communication strategies for improved customer experience.
Designing an Educational Framework to Facilitate Educational Access for Women Using Machine Learning
TFM project: interpretable machine learning framework for early market risk estimation on the S&P 500.
An automated machine learning framework to model multiple stock price series.
Predicting 30-Day Hospital Readmission in Diabetic Patients A Nested Cross-Validated, Calibrated Machine Learning Framework with DeLong Statistical Comparison and SHAP Explainability
A professional, self-contained machine learning framework for hybridizing a feedforward artificial neural network (ANN) with Haar wavelet features for regression on time-ordered environmental data.
Badr is a framework for training fair machine-learning models that minimize a chosen fairness metric while preserving Pareto-optimal performance across sensitive groups.

An Explainable AI framework for automated analysis and priority classification of public grievances using NLP and Machine Learning. The system leverages TF-IDF, Random Forest, LIME, and Gemini API to classify grievances into priority levels, provide transparent explanations, and deliver real-time insights through an interactive Streamlit dashboard.

Financial risk prediction framework for Indian banks using Panel Data Econometrics and Machine Learning. Built with Python, featuring Panel Logistic Regression, Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, SVM, KNN, Nave Bayes, PCA, and comprehensive EDA on a dataset of 41 Indian banking institutions (20212026).
AI-Based Log Investigation Framework for Next-Generation Cyber Forensics using Machine Learning and Streamlit.
RESS"Improving maritime accident severity prediction accuracy: A holistic machine learning framework with data balancing and explainability techniques"
A declarative, validation-first data refinery pipeline for automated machine learning benchmarking.
Professional AI-assisted quantitative trading framework for research, backtesting, machine learning and automated execution.
Explainable AI (XAI) framework designed to provide transparent, interpretable insights for both tabular and image-based machine learning models.

Designed a hybrid machine learning framework for detecting zero-day cyberattacks in intrusion detection systems using Random Forest, XGBoost, and adversarial training techniques. Improved robustness and reduced false positives across benchmark cybersecurity datasets.
A comprehensive ranking and evaluation framework for machine learning models and algorithms
Neural-Edge Synthesis Framework utilizing Self-Healing Machine Learning for Distributed, Scalable, Intelligent System Engines.

A decentralized IoT + Machine Learning system for hyperlocal cloudburst/landslide risk prediction. ESP32 sensor nodes (soil moisture, rainfall, DHT11) transmit over LoRa and WiFi-UDP to a Flask server running a RandomForest classifier, with real-time MySQL logging, a live web dashboard, and Blynk/GSM/buzzer field alerts.
This repo comprises a spatially-aware machine learning model framework
